data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for actor identity and timestamp traceability.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Actor identity and timestamp traceability', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this traceability, yet there are no supporting details in the prior steps to demonstrate its implementation, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of actor identity and timestamp traceability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
